name: M&M Pawn Shop
description_short: M&M Pawn Shop offers collateral-based loans in Houston, TX. Located at 4628 N McCarty St with extended weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long: M&M Pawn Shop is a pawn operation located in Houston, Texas at 4628 N McCarty Street in the 77013 zip code. The business operates as a traditional pawn shop, providing collateral-based lending services to consumers in the greater Houston area. Pawn shops serve as an alternative financial service for individuals who need quick access to cash by pledging personal items of value as security for short-term loans. M&M Pawn Shop maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week to serve its customer base. The business is reachable by phone at (713) 674-5224 for inquiries about loan terms, eligible items, or general information. M&M Pawn Shop distinguishes itself through its accessible location in north Houston and reliable operating schedule that spans six days per week. The shop opens at 8:30 AM on weekdays and Saturdays, closing at 6:00 PM, providing customers with a full business day to visit and conduct transactions. This extended availability compared to some alternative financial service providers makes it convenient for working individuals. A key caveat for consumers is that pawn loans involve surrendering personal property as collateral, and failure to repay results in forfeiture of the pledged items. Additionally, while the website content provided is limited to basic contact and hours information, it contains no details about interest rates, loan terms, fees, or the specific types of items accepted. Consumers should contact the business directly to understand the complete terms of service before pledging valuable items.
pros: Open 6 days per week with extended hours (8:30 AM - 6:00 PM) for customer convenience
Accessible north Houston location at 4628 N McCarty St
Direct phone line (713) 674-5224 available for customer inquiries
Consistent operating hours Monday through Saturday provide reliable access
Quick cash access without credit checks typical of pawn transactions
No loan application or underwriting delays
Simple collateral-based lending model without debt reporting
cons: No online presence or website with service details, rates, or terms information
Requires surrendering personal property as collateral with risk of permanent loss if loan not repaid
No information available regarding interest rates, fees, or loan repayment terms
Limited business hours (closes at 6:00 PM) may not accommodate all customers
No details provided about acceptable items or loan amounts
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools)
People seeking short-term loans without credit checks or complex applications
Consumers in the Houston area with accessible transportation to N McCarty location
Those comfortable with collateral-based lending and item forfeiture risk
diagnosis: M&M Pawn Shop is best for Houston-area consumers who own valuable items and need fast cash without credit evaluation or lengthy application processes. The primary caveat is the lack of publicly available information about rates, terms, and fees—consumers must contact the shop directly before pledging items, and they assume the risk of losing personal property if unable to repay the loan.
services: Item storage and safekeeping during loan term
